assertion_results.text: Agent checks current project context before any operations
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 15-20 (Step 1): 'gcloud config get-value project' and 'gcloud auth list' — both run before any mutating operations. Line 24: 'We need to confirm the active project and authenticated account before making any changes.'

assertion_results.text: Agent runs a read-only command to check if container.googleapis.com API is enabled (gcloud services list)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 35: 'gcloud services list --enabled --filter="config.name=container.googleapis.com" --format="value(config.name)"' — checks API status before attempting to enable.

assertion_results.text: Agent shows the exact gcloud container clusters create command with all specified parameters (us-east1, autoscaling 1-5, e2-standard-4)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 66-72: 'gcloud container clusters create staging-cluster --region=us-east1 --machine-type=e2-standard-4 --enable-autoscaling --min-nodes=1 --max-nodes=5 --num-nodes=1' — includes us-east1, autoscaling 1-5, and e2-standard-4.

assertion_results.text: Agent explicitly asks for user confirmation before running the cluster create command
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 86-88: 'PAUSE: Ask the user for confirmation before running this command. This creates billable infrastructure (VMs, load balancers, etc.).'

assertion_results.text: Agent explicitly asks for user confirmation before enabling the API (gcloud services enable)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 55-56: 'PAUSE: Ask the user for confirmation before running this command, since it enables a billable API on the project.'
Lines 69-71: '--enable-autoscaling', '--min-nodes=1', '--max-nodes=5' all present in the create command.

assertion_results.text: Agent proposes a verification command (describe or list) to run after cluster creation
assertion_results.evidence: Line 102: 'gcloud container clusters describe staging-cluster --region=us-east1 --format="table(name,location,status,currentNodeCount,autoscaling)"' — proposed as Step 5 'Verify the cluster was created successfully' after creation.

assertion_results.text: Agent does NOT use --quiet flag on any mutating commands
assertion_results.evidence: No '--quiet' flag appears anywhere in the entire output. Verified by full-text inspection of all commands.
